## [00:00 - 02:02]

Okay, so this is an example of the funnel tracking sheet and essentially you've got a link to this below. What we want to do is, so this is the client one that we're working off for the purposes of the training here. So what we want to do here is we basically just want to pull out the funnel that we mapped out. Now this is what you're going to send the client. So this one, the funnel can, the client can look at this one. However, this sheet is internal because as you can see it's a lot more granular and it's just a little bit too intense for clients to look at. But here's where we want to actually start getting granular in terms of the type of targeting because obviously here it was just very broad. This is, you know, we're just going to do a lookalike here. We're actually segmenting out the percentage, exclusions, our audience sizes, the budget that we're going to allocate to that, the placements. We're also going to be dropping in the creative and then all of the stages of the funnel that we're running. Now this sheet here has two other sheets as well beneath it. So one for our rapid fire testing for our audience mapping and then also for our tracking. So this is kind of our weekly tracking. And what you want to do is you just want to also make sure that you're coming in here and writing out what your success metrics are in here so that you don't have to keep bouncing back between this sheet and this sheet. So just go in here and fill this out and this is basically how to set up your ad tracking sheet.
